# Layout Patterns

## Flowcharts

Use left-to-right for product and business flows. Group by actor, system, or
team when handoffs matter.

## Architecture

Use groups for actors, channels, services, data, external systems, and
observability/security boundaries. Prefer multiple diagrams when more than
12-15 elements compete in one view.

## ERD/Data

Use table/entity shapes and label relationships. Keep domains grouped. For
large schemas, split by bounded context.

## Refinement

Preserve IDs when possible so diffs and user references remain stable.
